meta.metric: 20% increase in WAU by end of Q3
meta.alignment: Supports product vision of becoming the daily tool for remote teams

children.name: Users struggle to find relevant content quickly after logging in

meta.evidence: 6 out of 8 users mentioned spending more than 2 minutes looking for where they left off

children.name: If we build a personalized 'Continue where you left off' dashboard section, then power users will return daily because they feel instantly oriented

meta.experiment: Build a clickable prototype of the new dashboard section and test with 10 users in a moderated session
meta.signal: Time-to-first-action drops below 30 seconds for 70% of test users

children.name: If we add a global search with recent items, then users will spend less time navigating and more time doing work

meta.experiment: A/B test: 50% of users see a search bar with recent items pinned at the top
meta.signal: Session depth (pages visited) increases by 15% in the test group

children.name: New users don't understand the core value within the first session

meta.evidence: 4 users in onboarding interviews said they weren't sure what to do after signing up

children.name: If we create an interactive onboarding checklist, then new users will complete the core workflow in session 1 because they have clear next steps

meta.experiment: Fake door test: show a 'Getting Started' checklist to new signups and track completion rate
meta.signal: Day-1 core workflow completion rate increases from 20% to 40%

children.name: If we send a contextual tip email 24h after signup, then users will return and discover a key feature they missed

meta.experiment: Send a plain-text email with one actionable tip to a 50% sample of new signups
meta.signal: Day-2 return rate increases by 10 percentage points in the email group

children.name: Team leads can't see their team's progress at a glance

meta.evidence: All 3 team lead interviews cited lack of visibility as their top frustration

children.name: If we build a team activity digest email (weekly), then team leads will stay engaged without needing to log in daily

meta.experiment: Manually curate and send a weekly digest to 5 team leads for 4 weeks, then survey them
meta.signal: 4 out of 5 team leads rate the digest as 'very useful' and want it automated
